{{Quote|As it happens, Calius is one of the few places in Imperial space where I'm perfectly safe. The Berchestian governor and I have known each other for several years. More to the point, there are certain items important to him which only I can supply.|[[Talon Karrde]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The Last Command">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Raccyx Staffa''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]].

==Biography==
Staffa started his career as a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and retired with a decent amount of credits and contacts. He was enamored with the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of Berchest and joked that he would retire there and enter politics. When he quit smuggling, he was elected to the [[Berchestian Council]]. He found out the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] was taking kickbacks from smugglers operating on the planet and blackmailed him into quitting and suggesting Staffa as a replacement. Once appointed, Staffa reached out to his former colleagues and setup an informal "taxation" program that involved taking a cut of the business taking place on Berchest. While he thought he was able to avoid attention, [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] kept an eye on him to help root out other members of the fringe.<ref name="TTS" />

Staffa had known and had a working agreement with the smuggler chief [[Talon Karrde]] for several years. His assistant [[Fingal]] went behind his back and told of his dealings with Karrde to [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].
